introSection: Family Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at ViaSea in Tuzla, Istabul, Istanbul, Turkey.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Green track with yellow supports.

The ride is one of four Intamin Family Coaster. The ride is an updated version of Mine Train Ulven at Bakken.

fullText:
Family Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at ViaSea in Tuzla, Istabul, Istanbul, Turkey.

Green track with yellow supports.

The ride is one of four Intamin Family Coaster. The ride is an updated version of Mine Train Ulven at Bakken.
